description: Add theme switching functionality with light mode support

userStories.title: Theme Toggle Button in Header
userStories.description: Add a sun/moon icon button to the header that toggles between dark and light themes
acceptanceCriteria: Shows moon icon in dark mode, sun icon in light mode
Positioned on the right side of header

userStories.title: Light Theme CSS Variables
userStories.description: Define light theme color variables in globals.css and apply them when light mode is active via a class on html/body
acceptanceCriteria: Light theme variables defined in CSS
Theme applied via class toggle (e.g., 'light' class)
Background, text, and accent colors adjust appropriately
Brand colors (coral/cyan) work in both themes

userStories.title: Persist Theme Preference
userStories.description: Save theme preference to localStorage and restore it on page load
acceptanceCriteria: No flash of wrong theme on load

userStories.title: System Preference Detection
userStories.description: Detect system color scheme preference (prefers-color-scheme) and use it as default when no localStorage preference exists
